Video.summary: From 'Haunted Hill' to Corman classics, Vincent Price sent shivers down the spines of horror fans for decades.
Video.grandparentTitle: Vincent Price: Master of the Silver Scream
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shocked by the death of her spouse, a scheming widow hatches a bold plan to get her hands on the inheritance, unaware that she is targeted by an axe-wielding murderer who lurks in the family's estate. What mystery shrouds the noble house?
Video.title: Dementia 13

Video.summary: A young man turns to a witch doctor to lure the woman he loves away from her fiancķ, but instead turns her into a zombie slave.
Video.title: White Zombie

Video.summary: A young woman tries to escape her traumatic past, only to find herself haunted by a ghoulish mystery man from an abandoned carnival pavilion.
Video.title: Carnival of Souls

Video.summary: From Red River to Rio Bravo, outlaws and legends collide in some of the greatest Westerns ever made.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Dollars to Django and beyond, Italian westerns captured the frontier with style, scale, and unforgettable antiheroes.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These Hollywood Westerns looked beyond legend, showing audiences the harsh reality of frontier conflict.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From sharp satire to offbeat stories, these Westerns put a fresh spin on Hollywood's wildest frontier.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Two masters of horror bring your nightmares to the big screen in this spine-chilling collection.
Video.grandparentTitle: Terror Titans: The Films of Wes Craven and John Carpenter
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A gripping collection of noir classics, where crime, corruption, and fate collide on the big screen.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hardboiled & Haunted: The Art of Noir Cinema
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Mutated beasts, creepy crawlies, and more movie monsters are coming to get you!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Hammer hits to Corman classics and more, these movies made Christopher Lee a horror icon.
Video.grandparentTitle: Christopher Lee: From Fangs to Frights
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Norman Bates to Michael Myers and more, these killers love carving up the screen.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Celebrating the timeless tales of heroes, gods, and epic battles that defined classic cinema.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Legendary Hollywood hitmaker John Badham (Saturday Night Fever, Blue Thunder) talks about his favorite films.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A sword-wielding serial killer is stalking drive-in movie theaters around rural California. Can the police stop the bloodbath before the deranged madman strikes again?
Video.title: Drive-In Massacre

Video.summary: A distraught young woman witnesses a murder and is committed to a sanitarium by the very man who did it.
Video.title: Shock
